heading: Error Handler Logs
body:
> **Note:** This procedure refers to App Services Admin API endpoints. It does
> *not* use Atlas Administration API endpoints.

Retrieve `TRIGGER_ERROR_HANDLER` type logs via a `GET` request to
the [Retrieve App Services Logs](atlas/app-services/admin/api/v3) endpoint:

```shell
curl -X GET 'https://services.cloud.mongodb.com/api/admin/v3.0/groups/{groupId}/apps/{appId}/logs' \
   -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
   -H 'Authorization: Bearer <access_token>'
   -d '{
      "type": "TRIGGER_ERROR_HANDLER"
      }'
```
